programme.title: Brazil

programme.title: The Vampire's Night Orgy
programme.desc: Stranded travelers seek refuge in a remote village, only to discover it's inhabited by vampires with sinister intentions.

programme.title: Satan's Cheerleaders
programme.desc: The janitor at a local high school is actually the scout for a coven of Satanists on the lookout for a virgin to sacrifice. One day he kidnaps the cheerleading squad to use for their rituals. However, one of the cheerleaders is actually a witch.

programme.title: Ronin

programme.title: The Dirty Dozen: The Fatal Mission

programme.title: Traffic

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: Things go awry when car salesman Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) hires two thugs to kidnap his wife. Soon, the very pregnant and chipper Police Chief Marge Gunderson (Frances McDormand) takes the case. Is she up for the challenge? You betcha.

programme.title: The Forger
programme.desc: A thief (John Travolta) works with his father (Christopher Plummer) and son to forge a painting by Monet and steal the original. Together, they plan the heist of their lives!

programme.title: Pod

programme.title: Darkside

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.desc: It seemed like a match made in heaven when youth pastor Couty married a preacher's daughter, but when Couty meets his untimely end, a police investigation reveals a web of lies.

programme.title: Happily Never After

programme.title: Happily Never After

programme.title: Happily Never After

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Cases

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Mahmuda Khatun

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 025

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 040

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 119
programme.desc: Graduate student Gelareh Bagherzadeh was shot outside her Houston home, followed by the murder of Coty Beavers. The killers were Ali Irsan and his son Nasim, enraged over Ali’s daughter marrying Beavers. Both were convicted; Ali is now on death row.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 027

programme.desc: The Germans want to safely build a synthetic fuel plant in Stalag 13, but Hogan convinces them that there is oil beneath the camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: While Hogan detains a German general during an Allied offensive, a Gestapo officer looks into Stalag 13's perfect escape record.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Playing Possum
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rainy Day Woman
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ticket to Ride
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources - the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then, Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Irons in the Fire
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rocky Mountain Roundup
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: This One's For You
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Baby Lyssa Steps Up
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Inside Out
programme.desc: Dog kickstarts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: End of an Era

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: JFK

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: RFID Chips
programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Murder of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1991, Ray and Faye Copeland, the oldest death row couple in the USA, are convicted of murdering five drifters. Police find the bodies after a tip-off. Faye's death sentence is commuted to life in 1999.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, Ashley Pond and Miranda Gaddis disappear in Portland. Neighbor Ward Weaver, a suspect with a violent history, is later found guilty of their murders and sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: A picture-perfect Canadian couple Karla Homolka and Paul Bernardo join to perform torture and mutilation on young victims - crimes that are virtually unspeakable. Two teenage girls were raped and murdered, and the couple even filmed themselves doing it.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 27, 2005, Dennis Rader, known as the BTK killer, pleads guilty to ten murders he committed in Wichita, Kansas, from 1974 to 1994. After a journalist's article reignites the case, Rader is arrested and sentenced to ten life terms without parole.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In September 1987, Simon Dale is murdered. His ex-wife, Susan Wilberforce, is acquitted of the crime but later convicted of fraud and sentenced to seven years. The murder remains unsolved.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, fashion journalist Christa Worthington is found murdered in her Truro home. Christopher McCowen is convicted in 2006 of her murder, robbery, and rape, despite his claims of innocence and other DNA found at the scene.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1999, NFL player Rae Carruth is convicted for orchestrating the shooting of his pregnant girlfriend. He is sentenced to 18-24 years. Their son, Chancellor, has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room!
programme.desc: Too young to see a real "James Hound" movie, the kids decide they'll make a film of their own. Next, how would YOU like to be four years old and completely misunderstood by your parents? And then be sent to your room for ten whole minutes?

programme.title: Arthur: The Pea and the Princess/D.W. and Dr. Whosit
programme.desc: The 3rd grade class is putting on a production of “The Princess and the Pea,” and Prunella is at the helm as director! Then, Mom and Dad tell D.W. she’s too young to watch a new television show that everyone is talking about.

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Breathless/The Fright Stuff
programme.desc: Will Buster's friends treat him the same after they learn he has asthma? Prankster have arrived in Elwood City--just in time for the "Scare Your Pants Off" costume party! It's boys vs. girls in what becomes a great big battle of the pranks.

programme.title: Arthur: My Club Rules/Stolen Bike
programme.desc: The gang can't agree on rules for their club, and each starts his own. Next, Francine's embarrassed by her crummy old bike. Why can't she have a shiny new one like all her friends?

programme.title: Arthur: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.desc: Buster learns that special effects can't take the place of hard work when conquering real mountains. Arthur is thrilled to find out that Sitting Bull once passed through town! He rallies the residents to mark the spot with a monument.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Mistrust and Mutual Fascination
programme.desc: We have long ignored the "intimate" relationship between Hitler and Stalin, this mixture of mistrust and mutual fascination.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Two Tyrants
programme.desc: With the German-Soviet pact, Stalin and Hitler put aside all political logic to let the Western democracies believe that such a rapprochement was impossible.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Fatal Liaison - The Strange Affair of Adolf and Eva
programme.desc: The protracted romance between Adolf Hitler and Eva Braun began in 1929 and ended in 1945 in the bunker under the ruins of the Chancellery.

programme.title: The Ultimate History of the Messerschmitt
programme.desc: In this program we look at the development of the Bf 109 which flew in all theaters of conflict in which the Luftwaffe was involved. More Bf 109s were built than any other fighter of the era.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Building The Brand
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: Destroyers and Cruisers showcases ships that with their speed and firepower became the backbones of 20th century navies. We tell the incredible story of USS Laffey, the WW2 destroyer that would come to be known as ‘the ship that would not die’.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Walking with Witches
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: Guns That Changed The Game: The Gods Of War
programme.desc: The Gods of War: The industrial revolution changed it all when it came to cannons as they evolved from wholly inaccurate and immobile to deadly killing machines.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Invasion of Panama
programme.desc: Invasion of Panama: In 1989, 20,000 US troops entered Panama to overthrow military dictator Manuel Noriega and around 500 civilians were killed. What prompted the invasion?

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: As one of their most controversial scientists, Heisenberg was key in the Nazis' efforts to build an atomic bomb. How close was he to achieving his goal?

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Evolution has assigned this vital and fascinating insect a thankless task.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Lost Queen of Atlantis
programme.desc: Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop are searching for a valuable energy source in Athens and discover that it is April's new necklace.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is exhausted, and he goes to fetch a pillow and a sleeping mask, but the Lemmings have entirely different plans for the couch.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Another heat wave, and even the riverbed is dried up. One very thirsty Grizzly discovers that the Lemmings have used the last remaining bottles of water to fill their inflatable pool.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over chocolate-spread jar lids, which they use as chips to win goodies. But more importantly, there's a grand prize, a giant jar of Yummy.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has prepared himself a TV dinner to eat in front of his favourite series, but his moment of pleasure is abruptly interrupted by unexplained static.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings are having a rave party. When Grizzy throws their stereo into the river, he sparks a general power outage and is unable to watch his favourite shows.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he realises that his beloved she-bear adores the smell of flowers, Grizzy decides to offer her the geraniums that decorate the window ledges of the ranger's cabin.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After making a fool of himself in front of the she-bear, Grizzly is ousted from the cabin by the Lemmings. But Grizzly's luck is about to change.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is persuaded that the she-bear he's in love with has been turned into a frog. Whilst he looks through books of fairy tales, searching for a means to return his beloved to her original form, the Lemmings try to recover the frog.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly discovers a baby raccoon not far from the log cabin. When he sees its big moist eyes, Grizzly melts and adopts the creature. When the Lemmings drag the baby into their dangerous games, the overprotective Grizzly steps in.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the pleasures of video games on the ranger's console. The Lemmings want to try their hand at the joystick but Grizzy refuses to interrupt his kart racing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A team competition tests the contestants' knowledge of pork, with the winners receiving an indoor sky-diving experience; during dinner service, both teams face struggles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Distillery of Spirits

programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a teen disappears, her family joins forces with the police to find her. But hopes of finding her alive quickly diminish when an alarming lead comes to light.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her home, police aren't sure if it's an accident or a murder until they receive an unexpected phone call, from an unexpected person.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a hard-working Virginia couple is brutally murdered on the eve of their anniversary, the ensuing investigation goes cold until detectives find the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Murder of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Shroud of Turin
programme.desc: Is this famous piece of linen cloth the actual burial cloth of Jesus Christ or a clever Medieval hoax?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What on Earth are they spraying? Richard travels into the field to meet several researchers who present compelling evidence that chemicals or biological agents are being deliberately sprayed into the atmosphere by some shadowy government agency.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911 Truth who present their case that the WTC towers were brought down by controlled demolition on 9/11.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A serious investigation of the long-held theory that Elvis Presley faked his death in August 1977. Jokes of Elvis sightings in Kalamazoo aside, there is a considerable volume of evidence to suggest Elvis may not have left the building

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1998, Peter Bergna's car crashes off a mountain, killing his wife Rinette. After suspicions arise and a first trial ends in a hung jury, Bergna is convicted of murder in 2002 following new testimony about his abusive behavior.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1975, 15-year-old Martha Moxley is murdered in Belle Haven, Connecticut. The case goes cold until 2002, when Michael Skakel, a family member, is convicted based on new evidence. Skakel maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On December 7, 1993, Colin Ferguson killed six and injured nineteen in the Long Island Railroad Massacre. Defending himself at trial, he bizarrely questioned his own victims and was sentenced to over 300 years in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1995 Paris, Guy Georges, a serial killer, was linked to multiple murders through DNA and later confessed in court. He was sentenced to life in prison, leading to the establishment of a DNA database for offenders in France.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In a gruesome 1989 case, Tracey Wigginton and her accomplices lure Edward Baldock with promises of a good time, only to brutally stab him to death, sparking a sensational trial that raised questions about the roles of her accomplices.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In July 2000, Sarah Payne is abducted and murdered. Roy Whiting, a convicted sex offender, is found guilty and sentenced to life in 2001. Sarah’s case leads to the implementation of “Sarah’s Law” in the UK in 2011.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!
programme.desc: It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.desc: Arthur always seems to wreck things, and this time it's Mom's computer. Can he get it fixed before Mom finds out? Then, Muffy A. Crosswire and Francine are absolute best friends, despite their rather obvious differences.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed
programme.desc: Binky spends the day with Bitzi Baxter and learns what it's like to be a news reporter. Then, D.W., Bud, and Rapty set out to solve the mystery of what really happened to D.W.'s snowball.

programme.title: Arthur: Cents-less/Buster the Lounge Lizard
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn decides it's time for his class to learn a little about money. For the entire weekend, no one in the class can spend a cent. Buster has the brand-new Dark Bunny Dark Buggy, complete with grappling hook and voice commands!

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Building The Brand
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Why We Fight
programme.desc: This episode explores the way Hitler used propaganda to justify his warmongering, reframing it as defense of Germany’s people and borders. It investigates the role propaganda played for both Hitler and the Allies to mobilize their countries for war.

programme.title: I Have Never Forgotten You
programme.desc: I Have Never Forgotten You provides an intimate portrait of famed Nazi hunter and humanitarian, Simon Wiesenthal. This rare biography looks closely at the sacrifices made by one of history's bravest and boldest.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: Ju52: Explore classic and underrated aircraft, from WWII fighters to the Screaming Eagles F4, showcasing aviation's evolving history.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII
programme.desc: From the Indian border in Burma to China, which has been at war with Japan since 1937, the war grows more savage. In Europe, despite having less resources than when he first made the attempt, Hitler renews his assault on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Armageddon 1943-1945
programme.desc: Armageddon 1943-1945: The defeat at Stalingrad in 1943 was the turning point of the war and convinced the Nazi leadership to intensify their terror and propaganda campaigns.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Mosquito: The Wooden Wonder
programme.desc: We trace the astonishing story of designers turning away from metal and back to wood to create a twin-engine bomber that could outrun almost any aircraft in the sky, yet deliver a bomb load greater than an Avro Lancaster.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Heavenly and Lisa Nicole's collaboration turns ugly when Heavenly shares her feelings about Lisa's marriage; Simone returns to work with a trans patient who wants gender reassignment surgery; Jackie's topless charity photo shoot spins out of control.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: After their argument at Toya's prom party, Mariah and Quad's friendship is on shaky ground; Quad is planning a birthday bash for Dr. G but doesn't want Mariah to bring her drama to the party; Toya realizes she can no longer afford her lifestyle.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Toya and Eugene must move into a smaller house; Jackie and Curtis' marriage continues to take a backseat to Jackie's career; Mariah and Simone meet to get their friendship back on track; Toya treats the women to a spa day to get ready for Hawaii.

programme.title: Married to Medicine

programme.title: Married to Medicine

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing San Francisco
programme.desc: Real estate agents Justin Fichelson, Andrew Greenwell and Roh Habibi strive to outsell one another in a market filled with demanding young tech clients; veteran agent Andrew fails to predict a colleague's mistakes; newcomer Roh must prove his worth.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing San Francisco
programme.desc: Justin's new listing in the Mission District is still under construction, so he must sell the neighborhood before he can sell the house; Roh's business partner, Joel, criticizes his open house; Andrew deals with an emotional seller.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing San Francisco
programme.desc: Andrew lands a listing in the up-and-coming neighborhood of Bernal Heights; while Justin's property is finally finished, the size of the backyard proves to be a difficult selling point; Roh makes a promise that may be difficult to keep.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing San Francisco
programme.desc: Roh finally manages to track down the architect of his new listing, but faces an even harder task; Justin takes a listing with his dentist; Andrew's quest to find a property in Bernal Heights takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Two hours behind schedule and nearing the end of its 53-minute trip from Newark, New Jersey, Continental Connection Flight #3407 has to fight through a treacherous blizzard.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Just minutes after taking off from New York’s LaGuardia Airport, United Airlines Flight #1549 collides with a flock of birds.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: While landing at Sao Paolo’s notoriously treacherous airport, TAM Airlines Flight #3054 hurtles down the runway at top speed and crashes into a building and adjacent gas station.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Pummeled by turbulence, West Caribbean Airways Flight #708 is flying through a moderate hurricane when the aircraft mysteriously drops from the sky and crashes on a remote Venezuelan farm.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: With 248 elite American soldiers on board, Arrow Air Flight #1285 refuels in Newfoundland but just seconds after taking off, the plane crashes igniting a storm of controversy.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A chef and her husband swap Buckinghamshire for France to set up a fine dining gite, a British couple reap the fruits of their labour, and an expat diver on the Costa del Sol fails to open his new scuba school.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, an expat-run family friendly villa complex opens the doors guests. The Buckinghamshire couple running a fine dining gite in France are caught short by early arrivals, and there’s uncertainty for a Brit-run scuba school.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A chef from Buckinghamshire needs more income, so he opens up a cookery school in France, the British owner of a Spanish dive school waits for important news about his Gibraltar licence, and a couple from Portsmouth begin their new lives in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Essex with a dream of running a Spanish bar. At a Brit-run cooking school in France, a knife skills course doesn’t end well, and can a Portsmouth couple open their new bed & breakfast before the season comes to an end?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Once Upon A Time

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: As he watches birds fly overhead, Riff begins to daydream of flying himself. After seeing all the Moms playing with their kids in the Park, Baby Bop wonders what makes somebody a Mommy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Venice, Anyone?
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Riff find a pirate map, but in order to find the treasure, they have to be able to count. It’s time for a music concert in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.desc: The Turtles take an incredible trip back in time when they follow Shredder back to 16th Century Japan, where they join forces with Splinter's ancestor, the youthful samurai koji, and help him found the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Convicts from Dimension X
programme.desc: Donatello, tinkering with his InterDimensional Early Warning System device, accidently frees two vicious convicts from their maximum security cell on Dimension X, bringing them to earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): White Belt, Black Heart
programme.desc: Splinter's ancient sensei, Master Mogo-San, arrives from Japan, seeking to find his grandson, to hand him a precious family heirloom - a sacred white ninja belt.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Rogues
programme.desc: Determined to stop the turtles once and for all, Shredder enlists some of the most memorable villains from past episodes into an army of 'rogues'!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Neutrinos
programme.desc: When Krang captures the Neutrino's, he subjects the fun-loving, hot-rodding teenagers from Dimension X to a brain treatment which turns them evil!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Escape from the Planet of the Turtleoids
programme.desc: The Turtles must once again help their Turtleoid friend Kurma defend the planet Shellri-La from alien invaders.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Revenge of the Fly
programme.desc: When Baxter Stockman, AKA the Fly, gets his pincers on some of Krang and Shredder's mutagen, he uses it to start turning everyone in the city into giant hideous mutant insects!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Atlantis Awakes
programme.desc: The Turtles join forces with Merdude, a strange fish-creature, and journey with him to the fabulous underwater city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dirk Savage: Mutant Hunter
programme.desc: When eccentric zillionaire A.J. Howard hires Dirk Savage, a professional mercenary, to rid the city of its 'mutant problem', the first mutants he goes after are the Turtles!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Krangazoids
programme.desc: It's trouble for the Turtles when Krang makes five clones of himself and sends them up to do his bidding in the city.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings draw inspiration from lessons they find in a martial arts book and start breaking every wooden object they can get their hands on into two. When Grizzy tries to stop them, they go on to the next lesson and get him in a judo hold.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: On the Case: The Long Path to Justice

programme.title: On the Case: A Dream Shattered
programme.desc: When a young teacher fails to show up for work, her principal goes looking for her at her home, where he makes a shocking discovery. The case would go cold until DNA technology helps police track down her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Desperate Cry
programme.desc: A mother's desperate cry for help alerts neighbors and leads to a terrifying discovery.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 1
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On The Case.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Clare Wood
programme.desc: In April 2007, Clare Wood met George Appleton on a dating website and they embarked on a relationship together. Unbeknownst to her, Appleton was a criminal with a severe history of violence against women.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder at Sea?
programme.desc: The disappearance of newlywed George Smith, who vanished from a cruise in the Mediterranean. This report uncovers the questionable alibis, failed polygraphs and a provocative video that involves the three men who last saw Smith alive.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Daughter, A Mortgage, and Two Murders
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the murders of Greg and Bernadette Ohlemacher in 2005. The Albuquerque, New Mexico couple had been shot dead in their home

programme.title: 48 Hours: Decades of Deceit
programme.desc: An Internet-savvy investigator works to solve a decades-old murder case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ryan Ferguson: Wrongful Conviction
programme.desc: The case of Ryan Ferguson, who was released from prison in 2013, after nearly 10 years behind bars for murder. 48 HOURS team have been investigating the murder and the bizarre circumstances that put Ryan Ferguson in prison for the crime since 2006

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Confession
programme.desc: Relatives of a beauty queen who was murdered more than 50 years ago suspect a priest committed the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Highway of Tears
programme.desc: Since 1969, more than 20 girls and women have disappeared or been killed along a road in, Canada, known as Highway 16.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: First, 61-year-old Mark Staudte dies suddenly, then his 26-year-old son, Shaun, dies five months later. Daughter Sarah, 24, falls ill nine months later and is hospitalized in critical condition.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: High school volleyball player Jeanna Giese is fatigued and has numbness in her arm. When she experiences double-vision and loss of balance, doctors know it is far more sinister than a sports injury.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Bianca's cold symptoms develop into tingling in her feet, making it difficult to walk and breathe. Marti has terrible migraines and is told that she has a brain tumor. Can a new doctor provide hope?

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Whitney thinks she has the flu but is then told she has 24 hours to live. Kelly experiences facial paralysis but what doctors eventually find is way worse than the initial diagnosis.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Frankie has excruciating pain in her stomach and hopes that a specialist can help. Lynn has a sore throat and a small lump on her neck. A specialist informs her of the gravity of the situation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Audit Couple
programme.desc: When the IRS decides to audit Oscar and his ex-wife Gaby, Felix offers to mediate between the contentious exes when he realizes that he might be the reason Oscar was audited in the first place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Make Room For Dani

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell plans to attend a big event honoring him for his past bowling glory, but is quarantined with Phil and Stuart. Holly secretly rewrites Eden's college paper and almost destroys her dream.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang attends a charity silent auction. Haskell wins a police ride-along. Phil wins dinner with his favorite sitcom TV Mom. Stuart and Holly are forced to share a cooking lesson with a celebrity chef.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: In the 1990s, electrician Tony Teare lured Corrine Bentley to remote moorland in the UK, promising her a job. In the violent attack that followed, he left her for dead.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Already a wanted criminal in Canada, fraudster Albert Walker fled to the UK and assumed the identity of a man who would become his business partner - Ronald Platt.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea

programme.desc: Posing as a member of the Rothschild banking dynasty, he duped a string of women in the UK and US.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys
programme.desc: The centaurs' struggle for equal rights threatens to turn violent.

programme.title: Hercules: The Legendary Journeys

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve is determined to fly a new version of the experimental plane that caused his near-fatal crash; guest Clifton James.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A story by a TV reporter (Farrah Fawcett-Majors) makes Steve the target of international kidnappers; guest Hari Rhodes.

programme.title: Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner tries to dissuade a young couple bent on revenge against an oil company; guest Morgan Woodward.

programme.title: Incredible Hulk

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner reverts to the Hulk to save a rock singer (Mackenzie Phillips) from an onstage suicide.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner tries to reunite a gifted teen with her mother, who is accused of kidnapping; guest June Allyson.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 3

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something behind me!

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who's down there?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Somebody walking there!
programme.desc: In this episode of the paranormal investigation series, the AYH team investigate a venue that has an intriguing history. Phil and Dale get a fright; Sara has a thought-provoking, emotional moment; and Jane becomes rather tongue-tied over it all.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Creeped out

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: This doesn’t seem real!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Stole 15 Years of My Life

programme.desc: Thornton says he can't trust his cheating girlfriend Crystal and wants her to take a lie detector test! Plus, Stephanie wants to prove to her husband Mathew that she's not having sex with her own family member! She wants the accusations put to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?

programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Prelude To Murder

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to the Sussex countryside to 'fish' for clues in a shotgun murder.

programme.title: The Scarlet Claw
programme.desc: When a gentlewoman is found dead with her throat torn out, the villagers blame a supernatural monster. But Sherlock Holmes, who gets drawn into the case from nearby Quebec, suspects a human murderer.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: After both teams are reorganized, the chefs blindly choose ingredients from which they must create a unique dish; the chefs must serve a five-course meal to UNICEF Ambassador Angie Harmon and other VIP attendees.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The red team and the blue team each create their own menus, from which guests can order during dinner service, the team that impresses diners with its food and service wins the challenge, contestants face elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants face the blind taste test, with the winning team getting an ice skating lesson with figure skater Rachael Flatt, and the contestants struggle to stay organized during the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay challenges the teams to create entrées with high dollar values, using ingredients purchased on a small budget. Three previous winners judge individual contestants' entrées.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants prepare a dinner service with guests from Oxfam America, including Minnie Driver, and two chefs struggle with their stations.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants travel to the Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum, where they cook gourmet versions of tailgate party food favourites for hungry football fans.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: 54 year old Simon Buis was savagely beaten and kicked to death in an Auckland park in 1980 by persons unknown. To this day, his killers have evaded capture.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Membership Denied
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Hartford, CT to Elks Lodge, the oldest and largest secret fraternal organizations in the country. Elks Lodge #19 is shrouded in mystery and tragedy with a gruesome death hanging over its head....and decades of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: TAPS gets into the spirit with an investigation of Bethlehem, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roller Ghoster
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS heads to Ohio to investigate Kings Island, anamusement park that sits on land that was thesite of an awful accident.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Naples, New York, to investigate the Naples Hotel.This hotel was built in 1895.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Flooded Souls
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Hales Bar Dam and Marina in Tennessee, to investigate a dam that was built on Native American land.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dead & Breakfast
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates a 19thcentury Bed and Breakfast in Red Boiling Springs, Tennessee, built by the Cloyd family.

programme.title: Moesha: Independence Day
programme.desc: It’s Moesha’s 18th birthday, and as a surprise, her family and friends unknowingly invite all of Moesha’s past boyfriends to the party.

programme.title: Moesha: I Studied Twelve Years For This?
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.

programme.title: Moesha: Good Vibrations?
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Moesha: Fired Up

programme.title: Moesha: The Party’s Over (Here)

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Frozen Assets Episode
programme.desc: Mona's birthday goes sour when she gets an unwelcome present from her mother. While Dee Dee continues to struggle with her life direction, she is presented with a new career option.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Young & The Restless Episode

programme.desc: Dee Dee enlists Mona's help when her agency's star baseball client wants to retire and embark on a music career. Big Dee Dee must break bad news to Phyllis when her cat, Fred, turns up missing.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big State Of The Reunion Episode
programme.desc: Mona must face old demons when she attends her 10 year high school reunion. Kai mounts an investigation after paraphernalia goes missing from the Delicious stock room. Spencer sets a date to meet the girl he's been corresponding with on-line.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big How To Do And Undo It Episode
programme.desc: When Spencer has trouble dumping his new girlfriend, he enlists Dee Dee's help breaking the news. After Phyllis's new boyfriend plans a romantic weekend away, she turns to an unlikely source for help with her sex life.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Days Of Wine And Neuroses Episode

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse

programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out
programme.desc: Big Sis drops some bad news as the guys clash with Carolyn over a carnival unit at an auction in Long Beach. Ton and Allen unearth a Native American tomahawk, a dunk tank and a rare gun that can fire three shots at once.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: A Haunting: Curse Of The Mummy

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Fury
programme.desc: Shortly after Alicia and Scott Cain move into a farmhouse in the quiet Ohio countryside, they learn their home was the site of a brutal murder decades earlier. Plagued by the ghosts of this horrific event, they call in the Fourman Brothers to investigate.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: A Haunting: Marked By Evil
programme.desc: When Stephanie Winters rejects the advances of a friend, he steals a piece of her hair and threatens to put a spell on her. Soon after, Stephanie notices strange noises and objects moving on their own. Could Stephanie's friend have conjured a demon?

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a hard-working Virginia couple is brutally murdered on the eve of their anniversary, the ensuing investigation goes cold until detectives find the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a college freshman goes missing without a trace, concerned friends and family talk to police about his last whereabouts. Those conversations, however, raise more questions than answers when they point to a potentially deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a spate of murders in a small Louisiana community, detectives struggle to extract a confession from the main suspect until they invoke the memory of his deceased mother.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a schoolteacher is gunned down in public, a known felon's DNA and phone records link him to the crime. After investigators arrest the man, they discover the real killer might actually be someone else entirely.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer, a cat-and-mouse game ensues to get inside his mind and have him lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Janbaz Tarin
programme.desc: Raneem Oudeh came to the UK from Syria to escape war, looking forward to a brighter future for herself and her son. Everything was falling into place until she met Janbaz Tarin, a man who saw no boundary between love, obsession, and extreme violence.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bull's Eye
programme.desc: A Girl Guide leader is found dead on the floor of her bedroom. When an autopsy reveals a bullet lodged in her brain, detectives learn they’re investigating a murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: When a senior citizen is killed on a city street, authorities at first treat it as a typical hit-and-run accident. But as they investigate further, they begin to realize that the culprit is a thrill-seeking psychopath.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Mad Bomber
programme.desc: In 1996 a serial bomber begins planting bombs in public places and terrorizes the Prince Edward Island community. The mystery person leaves a strange swastika as a calling card, eluding capture for eight years.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Danger in the Woods
programme.desc: Three teenagers accompany a deliveryman to a densely wooded area for a drinking party that, before long, becomes a nightmare. Things take a terrifying turn when one of teens attacks the others.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust
programme.desc: One morning in the stairwell of a Toronto building, a guard makes a grotesque discovery: the dead body of a Filipina nanny. It's clear she's been savagely murdered and raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Predator
programme.desc: The phone rings in the middle of the night. On the other end of the line, the sounds of an attack. The couple that receive the call rush to its source and discover a horrific scene.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter. Burkhalter finds out. Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for $1,000,000 in diamonds, but can he be trusted?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi general's assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogan's success, Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht, each trying to take over Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt. Schultz.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany, so he creates a health spa.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: All goes well when Hogan's gang steals Klink's code book from his safe, photographs the contents, and returns it to its proper place. But there's a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary series. A massive manhunt ensues after three suspects flee into a farm. The team raids a drugs den, and officers stumble across a suspicious-looking postman (8/15).

programme.desc: Documentary series following an Essex police unit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tough Love
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surprise Ending
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Big Wipe-Out
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: You Can Bet On It!
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fly Boy
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit on this case takes them into some parts of Ohau, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hallu-Si-Nations
programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous 'Black Panther'.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Let's Go Hunting, Deer
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city." At Phil and Kay's, Miss Kay decides she wants to frame Phil's original blueprints from the first duck call he created.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Tickets To The Fun Show
programme.desc: During Duck Commander's "Casino Night" party, Si Robertson wins the grand prize of $2000 and decides to buy a massage chair for the duck call room. The massage chair becomes a detriment to the workflow, so Willie takes Si around for a replacement prize.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Be a Lady
programme.desc: Sadie, has a homecoming dance coming up, but Willie doesn't approve of her dress selection. Willie decides to take Sadie out to find her a new "appropriate" dress.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ring Around the Redneck
programme.desc: Though Jase lost his wedding ring long ago, Missy decides it's time for Jase to replace it with a new one. When Jase is duck hunting, once again, he loses the ring.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bass Man Standing

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Battle of the Brothers
programme.desc: Willie's suspicious behavior from dyeing his beard to buying a new motorcycle, makes Jase come to the conclusion that Willie is having a mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Ghost of McCastle McDuckula

programme.title: M.A.S.K.

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Danger Mouse
